191.reason: [The traversal should always start from vertex 0, but this loop starts from i=0 and skips 'item', which may skip vertex 0 if item==0. However, per problem description, item is never 0, so the real issue is that it should not loop over all vertices 鈥 it must start only from vertex 0. This causes incorrect BFS after deletion because it may start from multiple components or wrong start point.]
